name: laboratorio-testing-automation
description: Comprehensive Cypress-based test automation framework for QA Craft Growth Challenge
author: Ilverzon Zarate

scripts.test:critical: npm run clean:reports && npm run cy:run:critical && npm run report:merge && npm run report:generate
scripts.test:all: npm run clean:reports && npm run cy:run && npm run report:merge && npm run report:generate
scripts.test:report: npm run clean:reports && npm run cy:run && npm run report:merge && npm run report:generate
scripts.report:merge: rimraf cypress/reports/report.json && npx mochawesome-merge cypress/reports/json/*.json > cypress/reports/report.json
scripts.report:open: open cypress/reports/report.html || start cypress/reports/report.html || xdg-open cypress/reports/report.html
scripts.ci:test: npm run clean:reports && NODE_OPTIONS='' npm run cy:run:critical:chrome
scripts.ci:test:all: npm run clean:reports && NODE_OPTIONS='' npm run cy:run
scripts.lint:check: echo 'Linting check placeholder - add ESLint if needed'
scripts.posttest: mochawesome-merge cypress/reports/json/*.json > mochawesome.json && marge mochawesome.json --reportDir mochawesome-report --inline
